test_cases.title: Verify revive works in normal battle royale flow
test_cases.precondition: Player is logged in, matchmaking is available, and the match has started successfully.
steps: Launch a battle royale match with revive enabled.
Join the match and proceed through normal gameplay flow.
Trigger or use revive during normal gameplay.
Observe gameplay behavior and UI response.
test_cases.expected_result: revive should work correctly during normal battle royale gameplay.

test_cases.title: Verify revive handles invalid or unexpected player actions
test_cases.precondition: Player is in an active battle royale session.
steps: Start a match and reach a state where revive can be triggered.
Perform invalid, unexpected, or rapid player actions.
Try to use or interrupt revive in an abnormal way.
test_cases.expected_result: revive should fail safely without crashes, soft locks, or broken gameplay.

test_cases.title: Verify revive remains stable during final-circle pressure
test_cases.precondition: Player has reached a late-game or high-pressure endgame state.
steps: Play until the final circle or simulate endgame conditions.
Use or trigger revive during intense combat and zone pressure.
Monitor responsiveness, animation, UI, and gameplay stability.
test_cases.expected_result: revive should remain stable and responsive during high-pressure endgame conditions.
